top_signals.title: U.S.-Iran deal explained: What we know — and what remains unresolved
top_signals.summary: Stocks rose after a preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement, but questions remain over Hormuz, Israel and what follows a potential signing in Geneva.

top_signals.title: India’s ONGC Considers Resuming Venezuela Oil Operations
top_signals.summary: ONGC Videsh Ltd (OVL), the overseas unit of India’s state-owned Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC), considers reviving operations at its two onshore oil assets in Venezuela as the world’s top crude resource holder is welcoming foreign companies back to its industry.   OVL plans to resume its operations in Venezuela even if it still expects about $900 million in dividends due from state oil firm PDVSA for its stake in the two oil concession assets, Indian outlet Economic Times reported on Tuesday, quoting industry executives…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Everyman set to quit London stock exchange over investor pressure
top_signals.summary: Luxury cinema chain Everyman is set to drop its London listing over pressure from its shareholders, including an investment firm poised to trigger a takeover bid. Everyman said on Tuesday that it is likely to recommend to its shareholders that it drops its listing on the challenger AIM market, sending its share price plummeting. The [...]
